Built for asymmetric edge

Four intelligence layers that institutional traders wish didn't exist.

Signal Correlation

Cross-reference geopolitical events, options flow, and congressional filings in milliseconds to surface hidden patterns.

Threat Detection

AI-powered anomaly detection flags emerging risks before they materialize in asset prices.

Trade Signals

Actionable trade signals derived from congressional disclosure patterns and institutional order flow.

Geopolitical Mapping

Real-time risk mapping across 195 countries, updated as events unfold from 147 verified intelligence sources.

How it works

01

Connect your sources

Point Warpath at your brokerage data and preferred intelligence feeds. Setup takes 90 seconds.

02

Correlate in real-time

Our engine cross-references 147 signal sources against congressional disclosures and options flow as events happen.

03

Act with conviction

Receive structured intelligence briefs with confidence scores, context, and suggested positioning — before the crowd reacts.

Join the waitlist

Access is limited to 500 founding users. Institutional pricing. No retail.
